'''âp-f-f-r''' ('''kapaferoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hologramize|hologramize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-f-f-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hologramize|hologramize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-f-f-r
|-
! Lemma
| kapaferoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipaferoko|thipaferoko]] || [[word:jipaferoko|jipaferoko]] || [[word:shipaferoko|shipaferoko]] || [[word:kipaferoko|kipaferoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopaferoko|thopaferoko]] || [[word:jopaferoko|jopaferoko]] || [[word:shopaferoko|shopaferoko]] || [[word:kopaferoko|kopaferoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpaferoko|thĂŠpaferoko]] || [[word:jĂŠpaferoko|jĂŠpaferoko]] || [[word:shĂŠpaferoko|shĂŠpaferoko]] || [[word:kĂŠpaferoko|kĂŠpaferoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
